name: OSS: Agentic API Automation
description: Extends APIs through MCP and agentic interfaces to securely execute commands across Network, IT and Fintech.
strategic_outcome: Create a reusable agentic API execution layer for cross-domain automation.
kpi: Reduction in provisioning and manual operational effort
baseline_kpi: Reduction in manual execution by people on devices
current_kpi: Human engineers manually log onto and execute commdons on devices for 100% of functions
target_kpi: Human engineers manually log onto devices for 88% of functions

name: OSS: Unified Incident Intelligence
description: GenAI interface to query Network, IT and Fintech faults and service health from a single conversational view.
strategic_outcome: Federate incident intelligence across Network, IT and Fintech into one conversational operational view.
kpi: Reduced manual effort across multiple tools and improved response times
baseline_kpi: Reduction in manual log in and query across multiple tools by people
current_kpi: Reduction in manual log in and query across multiple tools by people

name: OSS: Automated Jira Ticket Governance
description: Augments accountability, sizing, check-ins and stakeholder updates for ASOC/OSS coordination.
strategic_outcome: Improve delivery governance visibility and reduce manual follow-up effort.
kpi: Improved visibility and reduction in manual follow-ups
baseline_kpi: Reduction in manual log into Jira and follow-ups and stakeholder updates by people
current_kpi: Human scrum masters perform 100% of activities manually
target_kpi: Human scrum master activity reduced by 50%
